## Descrizione

Come azienda familiare a conduzione tecnologica con quasi 19.000 dipendenti in 71 sedi in tutto il mondo, stiamo cercando pensatori innovativi con idee non convenzionali e la determinazione di unirsi al nostro team. La nostra cultura aziendale, che valorizza la collaborazione e la fiducia reciproca, crea il quadro ideale per provare nuove cose con coraggio e mettere in discussione lo status quo. Le nostre tecnologie ispirano le persone a sviluppare e produrre cose che attualmente sono impensabili. Siano laser, macchine utensili, EUV o elettronica - TRUMPF sta costruendo mondi tecnologici per le generazioni future. Sei pronto per nuove sfide?

## Mansioni

- Partecipazione alla produzione di sistemi di marcatura laser
- Monitoraggio e controllo della produzione in corso
- Analisi e risoluzione di errori e interruzioni
- Pianificazione e assegnazione del personale
- Punto di contatto per i dipendenti
- Supporto ai processi di produzione per garantire standard di produzione e qualità
- Piccoli progetti
- Continua miglioramento della qualità e dei processi (KVP, 5A)

## Requisiti

- Formazione professionale come automatista, elettricista, elettronico, polimacchinista o formazione equivalente
- Minimo tre anni di esperienza lavorativa in un campo simile
- Conoscenze nell'uso delle applicazioni PC comuni
- Conoscenze di SAP di vantaggio
- Buone conoscenze della lingua tedesca in parole e scrittura (livello B2 minimo)

## Cosa offriamo

- Cultura aziendale rispettosa e valorizzante
- Ambiente di lavoro moderno con tecnologia di ultima generazione
- Assunzione di responsabilità precoce e compiti vari
- Offerta di formazione e aggiornamento estesa
- Supporto attivo alla Work-Life-Balance, ad esempio con programmi di sport e fitness

## Contatto

- Sei stato convinto? 
  - Per favore, invia la tua domanda di lavoro online completa (motivazione, richiesta di salario e eventualmente motivazione per il trasferimento, curriculum, attestati di lavoro e documenti di qualificazione) a Nora Gaar.
  - Per eventuali domande, puoi contattarci al numero +41 (0) 58 257 6495.
  - Troverai tutte le FAQ relative alla tua domanda di lavoro sulla nostra pagina di carriera.

Stellenantritt: 01.04.2026. ## Das ist deine Aufgabe bei uns Kompetente Bearbeitung von Reservierungen für Einzel- und Gruppengäste als erster Ansprechpartner, wobei das höchste Maß an Professionalität und proaktiver Detailgenauigkeit gewährleistet wird Pflege und Aktualisierung der Gästedatenbanken mit höchster Genauigkeit, was maßgeblich zur Gästezufriedenheit und -loyalität beiträgt Umgehende und einfühlsame Bearbeitung von Gästebeschwerden, stets die passendste Lösung diskret und effizient findend Multikanal-Kommunikation managen, alle eingehenden Anfragen per Telefon und E‑Mail beantworten Koordination mit anderen Abteilungen, um eine optimale Abstimmung zwischen Zimmer‑ und Eventbelegung sowie unseren F&B‑ und Spa‑Angeboten sicherzustellen Unterstützung des Reservations Managers bei administrativen Aufgaben, Einhaltung unserer hohen Standards und Mitwirkung an der kontinuierlichen Verbesserung unserer Produkte ## Das bist du Charisma und Freundlichkeit mit natürlicher Wärme und kultivierten Manieren, kombiniert mit einem ausgeprägten Gespür für die Bedürfnisse anspruchsvoller Gäste Teamgeist und Flexibilität, ausgezeichnete Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und die Fähigkeit, sich in einem dynamischen Arbeitsumfeld anzupassen Erfahrung in der Luxus‑Hospitality, abgeschlossene Berufsausbildung und mindestens zwei Jahre Erfahrung in einem 5‑Sterne‑Hotel im Front Office oder Reservations Starke Sprachkenntnisse in Deutsch und Englisch (schriftlich und mündlich); zusätzliche Sprachen wie Italienisch sind von Vorteil Technische Kompetenz in Opera Cloud, Microsoft Word, Excel und Outlook sowie Erfahrung im Management von Online‑Buchungskanälen Hervorragende Organisationsfähigkeiten und Kundenorientierung, präzise Planung, diskrete Gästebetreuung und herausragende Serviceleistung ## Benefits Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeitenden das Herz unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, preiswerte Mahlzeiten im Mitarbeitendenrestaurant und zahlreiche Zusatzleistungen. Jetzt bewerben ## Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100 % People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with us You are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards. You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory. You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning. You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA. You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table. You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value. Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration. ## This is you Professional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience. Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales. Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus. Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm. Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development. Benefits At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100 % People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with us Front Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests. Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming. Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department. Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises. Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests. This is you Experience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts. IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications. Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele. Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling. Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards. Benefits At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Driver (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100 % People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with us Warm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment. Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order. Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride. Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed. This is you Natural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible. Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor. Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile. Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver’s license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road. Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage. Benefits At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

fr.title: Agent de réservations (H/F)
fr.description: Reservations Agent (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadine, Grisons). Temps plein : 100 %. Contrat : CDI / Permanent. Date de prise de fonction : 01/04/2026. ## Ce que vous ferez avec nous Gérer avec compétence les réservations pour les clients individuels et les groupes en tant que premier point de contact, en assurant le plus haut niveau de professionnalisme et une attention proactive aux détails Maintenir et mettre à jour les bases de données clients avec la plus grande précision, contribuant de manière significative à la satisfaction et à la fidélité des clients Traiter et résoudre rapidement les réclamations des clients avec sensibilité, en trouvant toujours la solution la plus adaptée de manière discrète et efficace Gérer la communication multicanale, répondre à toutes les demandes entrantes par téléphone et par e‑mail Coordonner avec les autres services afin d’assurer un alignement optimal entre l’occupation des chambres et des événements et nos offres de restauration et de spa Soutenir le Reservations Manager dans les tâches administratives, veiller au respect de nos standards élevés et contribuer à l’amélioration continue de nos produits ## Ce profil Charisme et convivialité avec une chaleur naturelle et des manières raffinées, combinés à une grande sensibilité aux besoins des clients exigeants Esprit d’équipe et flexibilité, excellentes compétences en communication et capacité d’adaptation dans un environnement de travail dynamique Expérience dans l’hôtellerie de luxe, formation professionnelle achevée et au moins deux ans d’expérience dans un hôtel 5 étoiles en Front Office ou Reservations Excellentes compétences linguistiques en allemand et en anglais (écrit et oral) ; les langues supplémentaires comme l’italien sont un atout Maîtrise technique d’Opera Cloud, Microsoft Word, Excel et Outlook, ainsi que l’expérience de la gestion des canaux de réservation en ligne Compétences organisationnelles exceptionnelles et orientation client, garantissant une planification précise, des relations discrètes avec les clients et un service de qualité supérieure ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont le cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des opportunités de développement attractives, des hébergements confortables, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. en.title: Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d)
en.description: Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01. ## This is what you move with us In this versatile key position, you are the “Enabler” of our entire F&B division. You bridge the gap between administrative precision, cutting-edge hospitality technology, and front-of-house operations. You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets. Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.” Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.” Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service. Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.” Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests. Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints. Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%). ## This is you Foundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry. Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset. IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud). Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure. Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts. Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? We look forward to receiving your application! ## Benefits At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. Apply now ## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027 This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application! BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Maître de Rang (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family. Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact. Be part of something extraordinary! This is youA completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. it.title: Assistente Food and Beverage (m/w/d)
it.description: Assistente Food and Beverage (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadina, Grigioni). Impiego: 100%. Contratto: Indeterminato / Permanente. Inizio: 2026-04-01. ## Questo è ciò che muovi con noi In questa versatile posizione chiave, sei l'“abilitatore” dell'intera divisione F&B. Colmi il divario tra precisione amministrativa, tecnologia all'avanguardia nell'ospitalità e operazioni front-of-house. Garantisci che i processi tecnici funzionino perfettamente in background supportando proattivamente la gestione F&B nel loro lavoro quotidiano. ### La tua missione - Dove il piacere culinario incontra la logistica: - Gestione delle prenotazioni: Sei il punto di contatto principale per le prenotazioni (in loco, telefono, email) tramite il nostro software per tutti i punti di ristoro dell'hotel. - Design e coordinamento dei menu: In stretta collaborazione con la cucina, il marketing e la gestione del ristorante, coordini e aggiorni i nostri menu tramite “Ai-web-to-print.” - Operazioni quotidiane: Durante la stagione, crei menu giornalieri per la mezza pensione, menu per il personale e etichette per buffet utilizzando “Ai-web-to-print” e “Viewneo.” - Esperienze degli ospiti: Gestisci richieste individuali degli ospiti per aperitivi o compleanni, garantendo quel “tocco extra” che definisce il nostro servizio. - Gestione delle amenities: Coordini le amenities per gli ospiti con la reception e il servizio in camera, inclusa la gestione dei pagamenti tramite “Saferpay” e “Opera.” - Supporto front-line: Quando necessario, supporti attivamente il nostro team direttamente nel servizio, rimanendo vicino ai nostri ospiti. - Ambasciatore della qualità: Garantisci il rispetto dei più alti standard (LQA e Forbes Travel Guide) e gestisci professionalmente i feedback e i reclami degli ospiti. - Eccellenza amministrativa: Preparazione di fatture aziendali e corrispondenza generale (quota ufficio circa 80–90%). ## Questo sei tu - Formazione: Diploma di apprendistato alberghiero o commerciale completato, nonché esperienza professionale in un ruolo simile, idealmente nel settore dell'ospitalità di lusso. - Eccellenza linguistica: Tedesco e inglese fluenti (scritto e parlato). L'italiano è un vantaggio significativo. - Competenza informatica: Padronanza di MS Office e dei sistemi alberghieri (ad es. Opera Cloud). - Personalità: Sei un talento organizzativo con assoluta affidabilità e discrezione. Rimani calmo e orientato alla soluzione, anche sotto alta pressione. - Mentalità da ospite: Comunichi al massimo livello di servizio, possiedi un aspetto posato e applichi una mentalità “hands-on” quando necessario. Perché il Kulm Group? Ti offriamo un luogo di lavoro dove tradizione e innovazione si incontrano. Avrai la libertà di plasmare attivamente i processi e beneficerai dei vantaggi di uno dei gruppi alberghieri più rinomati della Svizzera. Pronto a plasmare il mondo F&B di domani? Non vediamo l'ora di ricevere la tua candidatura! ## Vantaggi Al Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo opportunità di sviluppo interessanti, alloggi confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi.
requirements: Diploma di apprendistato alberghiero o commerciale completato
Esperienza professionale in un ruolo simile, preferibilmente nell'ospitalità di lusso
Tedesco e inglese fluenti; italiano è un vantaggio
Competenza in MS Office e sistemi alberghieri (es. Opera Cloud)
Talento organizzativo con affidabilità e discrezione
Capacità di lavorare sotto pressione e orientamento alla soluzione
Mentalità orientata al servizio e approccio hands-on
Aspetto posato e comunicazione di alto livello

de.description: Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01. ## Das bewegst du mit uns In dieser vielseitigen Schlüsselposition bist du der „Enabler“ unserer gesamten F&B-Abteilung. Du schlägst die Brücke zwischen administrativer Präzision, modernster Hospitality-Technologie und Front-of-House-Operationen. Du stellst sicher, dass technische Prozesse im Hintergrund reibungslos ablaufen, während du das F&B-Management proaktiv im Tagesgeschäft unterstützt. ### Deine Mission - Wo kulinarischer Genuss auf Logistik trifft: - Reservierungsmanagement: Du bist die zentrale Ansprechperson für Reservierungen (vor Ort, telefonisch, per E-Mail) über unsere Software für alle Hotel-Outlets. - Menügestaltung & Koordination: In enger Zusammenarbeit mit der Küche, dem Marketing und dem Restaurantmanagement koordinierst und aktualisierst du unsere Menüs über „Ai-web-to-print.“ - Tägliche Abläufe: Während der Saison erstellst du tägliche Halbpensionsmenüs, Mitarbeitermenüs und Buffetbeschriftungen mit „Ai-web-to-print“ und „Viewneo.“ - Gästeerlebnisse: Du bearbeitest individuelle Gästewünsche für Aperitifs oder Geburtstage und sorgst für den „Extra-Touch,“ der unseren Service ausmacht. - Amenity-Management: Du koordinierst Gästegeschenke mit der Rezeption und dem Zimmerservice, einschließlich Zahlungsabwicklung über „Saferpay“ und „Opera.“ - Front-Line-Support: Bei Bedarf unterstützt du unser Team aktiv direkt im Service und bleibst nah an unseren Gästen. - Qualitätsbotschafter: Du stellst die Einhaltung der höchsten Standards (LQA und Forbes Travel Guide) sicher und gehst professionell mit Gästefeedback und Beschwerden um. - Administrative Exzellenz: Erstellung von Firmenrechnungen und allgemeiner Korrespondenz (Büroanteil ca. 80–90%). ## Das bist du - Grundlage: Abgeschlossene Ausbildung im Hotel- oder kaufmännischen Bereich sowie Berufserfahrung in einer ähnlichen Position, idealerweise in der Luxushotellerie. - Sprachliche Exzellenz: Verhandlungssicher in Deutsch und Englisch (schriftlich und mündlich). Italienisch ist ein großer Vorteil. - IT-Kompetenz: Sicherer Umgang mit MS Office und Hotelsystemen (z. B. Opera Cloud). - Persönlichkeit: Du bist ein Organisationstalent mit absoluter Zuverlässigkeit und Diskretion. Auch unter hohem Druck bleibst du ruhig und lösungsorientiert. - Gastgebermentalität: Du kommunizierst auf höchstem Serviceniveau, trittst souverän auf und packst mit an, wenn es darauf ankommt. Warum die Kulm Group? Wir bieten dir einen Arbeitsplatz, an dem Tradition auf Innovation trifft. Du hast die Freiheit, Prozesse aktiv mitzugestalten, und profitierst von den attraktiven Vorteilen einer der renommiertesten Hotelgruppen der Schweiz. Bereit, die F&B-Welt von morgen zu gestalten? Wir freuen uns auf deine Bewerbung! ## Vorteile Bei der Kulm Group stehen unsere Mitarbeiter im Mittelpunkt unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Mahlzeiten im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche Vergünstigungen.

fr.description: Assistant Food and Beverage (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadine, Grisons). Temps de travail : 100 %. Contrat : Permanent. Début : 2026-04-01. ## Ce que vous apportez avec nous Dans ce rôle clé polyvalent, vous êtes le « facilitateur » de toute notre division F&B. Vous faites le lien entre la précision administrative, la technologie hôtelière de pointe et les opérations en salle. Vous assurez le bon fonctionnement des processus techniques en arrière-plan tout en soutenant activement la direction F&B dans ses activités quotidiennes. ### Votre mission - Là où le plaisir culinaire rencontre la logistique : - Gestion des réservations : Vous êtes le point de contact principal pour les réservations (sur place, par téléphone, par e-mail) via notre logiciel pour tous les points de restauration de l'hôtel. - Conception et coordination des menus : En collaboration étroite avec la cuisine, le marketing et la gestion des restaurants, vous coordonnez et mettez à jour nos menus via « Ai-web-to-print ». - Opérations quotidiennes : Pendant la saison, vous créez les menus quotidiens pour la demi-pension, les menus du personnel et l'étiquetage des buffets à l'aide de « Ai-web-to-print » et « Viewneo ». - Expériences clients : Vous traitez les demandes individuelles des clients pour des apéritifs ou des anniversaires, en veillant à apporter cette « touche en plus » qui définit notre service. - Gestion des amenities : Vous coordonnez les attentions pour les clients avec la réception et le service en chambre, y compris le traitement des paiements via « Saferpay » et « Opera ». - Support en première ligne : En cas de besoin, vous soutenez activement notre équipe directement en service, en restant proche de nos clients. - Ambassadeur de la qualité : Vous garantissez le respect des normes les plus élevées (LQA et Forbes Travel Guide) et gérez professionnellement les retours et réclamations des clients. - Excellence administrative : Préparation des factures d'entreprise et correspondance générale (environ 80–90 % de travail de bureau). ## Vous êtes - Formation : Diplôme en hôtellerie ou en commerce, ainsi qu'une expérience professionnelle dans un rôle similaire, idéalement dans l'hôtellerie de luxe. - Excellence linguistique : Maîtrise professionnelle de l'allemand et de l'anglais (écrit et oral). L'italien est un atout important. - Compétences informatiques : Maîtrise de MS Office et des systèmes hôteliers (par ex. Opera Cloud). - Personnalité : Vous êtes un talent organisationnel avec une fiabilité et une discrétion absolues. Vous restez calme et orienté solution, même sous forte pression. - Esprit d'accueil : Vous communiquez avec un niveau de service élevé, avez une apparence posée et adoptez une mentalité « hands-on » lorsque cela compte. Pourquoi le Kulm Group ? Nous vous offrons un lieu de travail où tradition et innovation se rencontrent. Vous aurez la liberté de façonner activement les processus et bénéficierez des avantages attrayants de l'un des groupes hôteliers les plus renommés de Suisse. Prêt à façonner le monde F&B de demain ? Nous attendons avec impatience votre candidature ! ## Avantages Au Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des opportunités de développement attractives, des logements confortables, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages.

## Descrizione
At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Production Supervisor __

## Job Summary
Contributes to ensuring a safe working environment in compliance with company guidelines, guaranteeing the achievement of Production targets during the shift. Supports the Production Supervisors in the daily coordination of operational activities, providing technical assistance to operators in the assembly and packaging areas. The work model for this role is on-site: #LI-Onsite

Please note that applications and CVs should be submitted in English.

## Main Roles and Responsibilities
- Monitoring and ensuring compliance with ABB safety guidelines and Code of Conduct during the shift
- Supporting the Production Supervisor / Logistics Supervisor to ensure the correct execution of production activities
- Providing technical support to operators (Assembly, Packaging) during daily operations
- Acting as the reference point for on‑the‑job training of production personnel
- Serving as the first level of contact for operational issues to be escalated to the relevant Production Supervisor
- Participating in Level 1 Q Circles by gathering technical and quality issues and communicating them to the appropriate supervisor

## License to Operate / Core Values
- Ensuring that all personnel (within the area of responsibility) understand ABB’s core values and the group’s safety and integrity standards, and acting accordingly
- Implementing and ensuring compliance with ABB’s Code of Conduct, tools, policies, and processes within the assigned area

## Collaboration / Leadership
- Promoting and enabling collaboration within the relevant work areas
- Managing relationships with stakeholders in the area of responsibility and ensures alignment

## Professional Skills and Experience
- Minimum 2–3 years of experience in operations, with experience in coordination roles
- Experience in the electromechanical field
- Previous experience in team coordination roles is considered a plus

## Education
- Vocational school diploma or equivalent

## More About Us
ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy-to-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions. The recruitment process is managed by Mara Werne, Talent Partner . Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences. Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit https://www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

en.title: Shift leader Assemblaggio / Imballo (80-100%)
en.description: Descrizione At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Production Supervisor __ ## Job Summary Contributes to ensuring a safe working environment in compliance with company guidelines, guaranteeing the achievement of Production targets during the shift. Supports the Production Supervisors in the daily coordination of operational activities, providing technical assistance to operators in the assembly and packaging areas. The work model for this role is on-site: #LI-Onsite Please note that applications and CVs should be submitted in English. ## Main Roles and Responsibilities - Monitoring and ensuring compliance with ABB safety guidelines and Code of Conduct during the shift - Supporting the Production Supervisor / Logistics Supervisor to ensure the correct execution of production activities - Providing technical support to operators (Assembly, Packaging) during daily operations - Acting as the reference point for on‑the‑job training of production personnel - Serving as the first level of contact for operational issues to be escalated to the relevant Production Supervisor - Participating in Level 1 Q Circles by gathering technical and quality issues and communicating them to the appropriate supervisor ## License to Operate / Core Values - Ensuring that all personnel (within the area of responsibility) understand ABB’s core values and the group’s safety and integrity standards, and acting accordingly - Implementing and ensuring compliance with ABB’s Code of Conduct, tools, policies, and processes within the assigned area ## Collaboration / Leadership - Promoting and enabling collaboration within the relevant work areas - Managing relationships with stakeholders in the area of responsibility and ensures alignment ## Professional Skills and Experience - Minimum 2–3 years of experience in operations, with experience in coordination roles - Experience in the electromechanical field - Previous experience in team coordination roles is considered a plus ## Education - Vocational school diploma or equivalent ## More About Us ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. it.title: Leader di Turno Assemblaggio / Imballo (80-100%)
it.description: Descrizione A ABB, aiutiamo le industrie a funzionare in modo più efficiente e pulito – e ogni persona qui contribuisce a questo risultato. Sarai autorizzato a guidare, sostenuto a crescere e orgoglioso dell'impatto che creiamo insieme. Unisciti a noi e aiuta a gestire ciò che gestisce il mondo. Questa posizione riferisce a: Responsabile di Produzione __ ## Riassunto del Lavoro Contribuisce a garantire un ambiente di lavoro sicuro in conformità con le linee guida della società, assicurando l'ottenimento degli obiettivi di produzione durante il turno. Supporta i responsabili di produzione nella coordinazione quotidiana delle attività operative, fornendo assistenza tecnica agli operatori nelle aree di assemblaggio e imballo. Il modello di lavoro per questo ruolo è su sito: #LI-Onsite Nota: le candidature e i CV devono essere inviati in inglese. ## Principali Ruoli e Responsabilità - Monitoraggio e assicurazione della conformità con le linee guida di sicurezza ABB e Codice di Condotta durante il turno - Supporto del responsabile di produzione / responsabile di logistica per garantire l'esecuzione corretta delle attività di produzione - Fornitura di supporto tecnico agli operatori (Assemblaggio, Imballo) durante le operazioni quotidiane - Agire come punto di riferimento per la formazione sul lavoro degli operatori di produzione - Servire come primo livello di contatto per le questioni operative da elevare ai responsabili di produzione pertinenti - Partecipazione ai Circoli Q Livello 1 raccogliendo le questioni tecniche e di qualità e comunicandole ai responsabili di produzione appropriati ## Licenza di Funzionamento / Valori Fondamentali - Assicurarsi che tutti i dipendenti (all'interno dell'area di responsabilità) comprendano i valori fondamentali di ABB e gli standard di sicurezza e integrità del gruppo, agendo di conseguenza - Implementazione e assicurazione della conformità con il Codice di Condotta ABB, strumenti, politiche e processi all'interno dell'area assegnata ## Collaborazione / Leadership - Promuovere e abilitare la collaborazione all'interno delle aree di lavoro pertinenti - Gestire le relazioni con i stakeholder nell'area di responsabilità e assicurare l'allineamento ## Abilità e Esperienza Professionali - Minimo 2-3 anni di esperienza in operazioni, con esperienza in ruoli di coordinamento - Esperienza nel campo elettromeccanico - Esperienza precedente in ruoli di coordinamento di squadra è considerata un plus ## Educazione - Diploma di scuola professionale o equivalente ## Altro su di Noi ABB Smart Power fornisce soluzioni di distribuzione di energia per centri dati, impianti industriali e di manifattura, infrastrutture critiche e edifici commerciali. I team tecnici della Divisione lavorano in stretta collaborazione con i partner dell'industria, fornendo soluzioni avanzate che supportano la crescita rapida, la transizione energetica e gli obiettivi di sostenibilità. La Divisione offre soluzioni di interruttori industriali, sistemi a basso voltaggio, applicazioni di avvio di motori e dispositivi di sicurezza come interruttori e relè. L'unità di protezione dell'energia sostiene le principali aziende di centri dati con soluzioni UPS avanzate e efficienti in termini di energia. La piattaforma ABB Ability™ Energy Manager fornisce una piattaforma scalabile e facile da utilizzare che aiuta le organizzazioni a risparmiare energia e ridurre le emissioni di CO2. Il processo di reclutamento è gestito da Mara Werne, Talent Partner . Costruire un futuro più pulito e intelligente richiede tutti tipi di menti: curiosi, coraggiosi e creativi. È per questo che accogliamo persone da tutti i contesti e le esperienze. Pronto a fare un impatto? Candidati oggi o visita https://www.abb.com per scoprire di più sull'impatto delle nostre soluzioni in tutto il mondo.
requirements: Minimo 2-3 anni di esperienza in operazioni
Esperienza nel campo elettromeccanico
Esperienza precedente in ruoli di coordinamento di squadra

de.title: Shift-Leiter Montage / Verpackung (80-100%)
de.description: Beschreibung Bei ABB helfen wir Industrien, effizienter und sauberer zu arbeiten – und jeder Mensch hier trägt dazu bei. Du wirst ermächtigt, gefördert und stolz auf den Einfluss, den wir gemeinsam schaffen. Join uns und hilf dabei, das zu gestalten, was die Welt antreibt. Diese Position berichtet an: Produktionsleiter __ ## Job-Zusammenfassung Trägt dazu bei, eine sichere Arbeitsumgebung sicherzustellen, die sich an die Richtlinien der Gesellschaft hält, und stellt sicher, dass die Produktionsziele während des Schichtdienstes erreicht werden. Unterstützt den Produktionsleiter / Logistikleiter bei der täglichen Koordination der operativen Aktivitäten und bietet technische Unterstützung für die Mitarbeiter in den Montage- und Verpackungsgebieten. Die Arbeitszeit für diese Rolle ist auf der Arbeit: #LI-Onsite Bitte beachten Sie, dass Bewerbungen und Lebensläufe in Englisch eingereicht werden sollten. ## Hauptaufgaben und Verantwortlichkeiten - Überwachung und Gewährleistung der Einhaltung der ABB-Sicherheitsrichtlinien und des Verhaltenskodex während des Schichtdienstes - Unterstützung des Produktionsleiters / Logistikleiters, um sicherzustellen, dass die Produktionsaktivitäten korrekt durchgeführt werden - Bereitstellung von technischer Unterstützung für die Mitarbeiter (Montage, Verpackung) während der täglichen Operationen - Aktion als Referenzpunkt für die Ausbildung von Produktionsmitarbeitern - Funktion als erster Ansprechpartner für operative Probleme, die an die zuständigen Produktionsleiter weitergeleitet werden - Teilnahme an Level 1 Q-Circles, indem technische und Qualitätsprobleme gesammelt und an die entsprechenden Leiter weitergeleitet werden ## Lizenz zum Betreiben / Kernwerte - Stellt sicher, dass alle Mitarbeiter (im Bereich der Verantwortung) die Kernwerte von ABB und die Sicherheits- und Integritätsstandards des Unternehmens verstehen und entsprechend handeln - Implementierung und Gewährleistung der Einhaltung des ABB-Verhaltenskodex, Werkzeuge, Politiken und Prozesse im zugewiesenen Bereich ## Zusammenarbeit / Führung - Förderung und Förderung der Zusammenarbeit innerhalb der relevanten Arbeitsbereiche - Management von Beziehungen zu Stakeholdern im Bereich der Verantwortung und Gewährleistung der Einhaltung ## Berufliche Fähigkeiten und Erfahrung - Mindestens 2-3 Jahre Erfahrung in der Betriebsführung, mit Erfahrung in Koordinationsrollen - Erfahrung im Bereich Elektromechanik - Vorherige Erfahrung in Koordinationsrollen von Teams wird als Plus angesehen ## Bildung - Abschluss einer Fachschule oder gleichwertige Qualifikation ## Mehr über uns ABB Smart Power bietet Energieverteilungslösungen für Datenzentren, industrielle und manufakturtechnische Anlagen, kritische Infrastruktur und kommerzielle Gebäude. Die technischen Teams der Division arbeiten eng mit Industriepartnern zusammen, um fortschrittliche Lösungen zu liefern, die die schnelle Wachstumsrate, die Energieumstellung und die Nachhaltigkeitsziele unterstützen. Die Division bietet industrielle Schaltkreise, Niedervolt-Systeme, Motoranfängeranwendungen und Sicherheitsgeräte wie Schalter und Relais. Die Energie-Schutz-Einheit unterstützt die weltweit größten Datenzentren mit fortschrittlichen, energieeffizienten UPS-Lösungen. Die ABB Ability™ Energy Manager-Plattform bietet eine skalierbare, einfache zu bedienende Plattform, die Unternehmen dabei hilft, Energie zu sparen und CO2-Emissionen zu reduzieren. Der Rekrutierungsprozess wird von Mara Werne, Talent Partner, geleitet. Die Schaffung eines sauberen, intelligenteren Zukunft erfordert alle Arten von Köpfen: die Neugierigen, die Mutigen und die Kreativen. Deshalb begrüßen wir Menschen aus allen Kontexten und Erfahrungen. Bereit, einen Einfluss zu haben? Bewerben Sie sich heute oder besuchen Sie https://www.abb.com, um mehr über den Einfluss unserer Lösungen auf der ganzen Welt zu erfahren.
requirements: Mindestens 2-3 Jahre Erfahrung in der Betriebsführung
Erfahrung im Bereich Elektromechanik
Vorherige Erfahrung in Koordinationsrollen von Teams

fr.title: Chef de Shift Montage / Emballage (80-100%)
fr.description: Description Chez ABB, nous aidons les industries à fonctionner de manière plus efficace et plus propre – et chaque personne ici contribue à ce résultat. Vous serez autorisé à diriger, soutenu à grandir et fier de l'impact que nous créons ensemble. Rejoignez-nous et aidez à gérer ce qui fait tourner le monde. Cette position rapporte à : Responsable de production __ ## Résumé du poste Contribue à garantir un environnement de travail sûr en conformité avec les lignes directrices de la société, en s'assurant que les objectifs de production sont atteints pendant le shift. Soutient le responsable de production / le responsable de logistique pour assurer la coordination quotidienne des activités opérationnelles, fournit une assistance technique aux opérateurs dans les zones de montage et d'emballage. Le modèle de travail pour ce rôle est sur site : #LI-Onsite Veuillez noter que les candidatures et les CV doivent être soumis en anglais. ## Principales tâches et responsabilités - Surveillance et garantie de la conformité avec les lignes directrices de sécurité ABB et le Code de conduite pendant le shift - Soutien du responsable de production / du responsable de logistique pour s'assurer que les activités de production sont correctement exécutées - Fourniture d'une assistance technique aux opérateurs (Montage, Emballage) pendant les opérations quotidiennes - Agir comme référence pour la formation sur le tas des opérateurs de production - Servir comme premier niveau de contact pour les problèmes opérationnels à transmettre aux responsables de production pertinents - Participation aux cercles Q niveau 1 en rassemblant les problèmes techniques et de qualité et en les transmettant aux responsables de production appropriés ## Licence d'exploitation / Valeurs fondamentales - S'assurer que tous les employés (dans le domaine de la responsabilité) comprennent les valeurs fondamentales d'ABB et les normes de sécurité et d'intégrité du groupe, et agissent en conséquence - Mise en œuvre et garantie de la conformité avec le Code de conduite ABB, outils, politiques et processus dans le domaine attribué ## Collaboration / Leadership - Promotion et facilitation de la collaboration dans les domaines de travail pertinents - Gestion des relations avec les parties prenantes dans le domaine de la responsabilité et garantie de l'allignment ## Compétences et expérience professionnelle - Minimum 2-3 ans d'expérience dans la gestion des opérations, avec expérience dans les rôles de coordination - Expérience dans le domaine électromécanique - Expérience précédente dans les rôles de coordination d'équipe est considérée comme un plus ## Éducation - Diplôme de l'école professionnelle ou équivalent ## Plus sur nous ABB Smart Power fournit des solutions de distribution d'énergie pour les centres de données, les installations industrielles et de manutention, les infrastructures critiques et les bâtiments commerciaux. Les équipes techniques de la division travaillent en étroite collaboration avec les partenaires de l'industrie, pour fournir des solutions avancées qui soutiennent la croissance rapide, la transition énergétique et les objectifs de durabilité. La division propose des interrupteurs industriels, des systèmes à basse tension, des applications d'arrêt de moteur et des dispositifs de sécurité tels que des interrupteurs et des relais. L'unité de protection de l'énergie soutient les plus grands centres de données du monde avec des solutions UPS avancées et efficaces en termes d'énergie. La plateforme ABB Ability™ Energy Manager fournit une plateforme scalable et facile à utiliser qui aide les entreprises à économiser de l'énergie et à réduire les émissions de CO2. Le processus de recrutement est géré par Mara Werne, Talent Partner. La création d'un avenir plus propre et plus intelligent nécessite tous types de cerveaux : curieux, courageux et créatifs. C'est pourquoi nous accueillons les personnes de tous les contextes et les expériences. Prêt à faire un impact ? Candidats aujourd'hui ou visitez https://www.abb.com pour en savoir plus sur l'impact de nos solutions dans le monde entier.
requirements: Minimum 2-3 ans d'expérience dans la gestion des opérations
Expérience dans le domaine électromécanique
Expérience précédente dans les rôles de coordination d'équipe

entries.value:
## Descrizione
Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Allocator Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com .

## Key information
- Start date: June 1st, 2026
- Duration: 12 months , full-time
- Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF
- Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland
- Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case)

## Eligibility requirements
- You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026
- You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship

## Mansioni
Let’s talk about the role! We are looking for a Allocator intern to join VANS within VF EMEA Internship Program. In this role, you will provide support to the Allocation Team:
- By taking an active role in analysing performance and sales trend.
- Monitoring deliveries, maintaining adequate stock levels.
- Taking care of replenishment / initial allocation for O&O EMEA Stores.
- Developing and maintaining reports and tools finding the best way to make them efficient and useful for the team.

## Requisiti
How you will make a difference You should be an analytical, resilient and curious team player, being:
- Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills.
- Passionate for numbers with strong analytical skills: accuracy and attention to details is a must.
- Proficient in Microsoft Excel.
- Knowledge of any BI platform will be considered as a plus (eg: Power BI).
- Eager to learn and face up new challenges.
- Proactive in order to achieve yours and your team goals.
- First experiences such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered as a plus

## Cosa offriamo
What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below:
- Learn about Vans’ trends and main logics of Retail Merchandising.
- Learn logics of inventory management, sales analysis, and allocation strategies.
- Learn to work with a wide team of internal stakeholder.

The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including:
- Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project
- One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands
- Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership

We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period.

Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy:
- Hybrid working policy
- 50% discount on VF brands
- On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives
- Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks
- Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location
- A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together.

Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day.

## Contatto
Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007

## Descrizione
Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as CRM & Loyalty Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com .

## Informazioni chiave
- Start date: June 1st, 2026
- Duration: 12 months , full-time
- Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF
- Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland
- Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case)

## Requisiti di ammissibilità
- You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026
- You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship

## Mansioni
Vans is looking for a curious and driven CRM & Loyalty Intern to support how we engage, reward, and grow our consumer community across EMEA, based in Stabio, Switzerland. Support the execution of Vans’ CRM and Loyalty strategy across EMEA, contributing to how we engage our community, strengthen loyalty, and bring the Vans brand to life through meaningful, data‑driven consumer experiences. You will gain hands‑on exposure to lifecycle marketing, loyalty mechanics, and cross‑functional collaboration within a global, youth‑culture‑driven brand.

- Support the execution of CRM campaigns across email, eCommerce, and other consumer touchpoints, ensuring brand consistency and flawless delivery
- Contribute to the setup, monitoring, and optimization of loyalty activations to drive engagement, retention, and member value
- Manage and update CRM assets such as campaign calendars, briefs, tracking files, and dashboards to support day‑to‑day execution
- Be responsible for supporting reporting and post‑campaign analysis, helping translate consumer and performance data into clear insights
- Develop a strong understanding of the Vans consumer, community mindset, and lifecycle stages by working closely with EMEA and Central teams
- Support additional ad-hoc digital media initiatives and projects as part of the wider Vans Brand Planning team

## Requisiti
What will make you successful in this role:

- A strong passion for the Vans brand, youth culture, and community‑driven marketing, with curiosity about how brands build long‑term relationships
- A genuine interest in CRM, loyalty programs, and data‑informed decision‑making, beyond just campaign execution
- An analytical mindset, with the ability to connect performance data to consumer behavior and brand impact
- High attention to detail and structure, essential for managing multiple campaigns and stakeholders in parallel
- A proactive, hands‑on attitude, comfortable working in a fast‑moving, international environment and learning by doing
- A degree in Marketing, Business, Economics, Data, or a related field is nice to have

## Cosa offriamo
In the role of CRM & Loyalty Intern , you will work at the heart of Vans’ consumer engagement strategy, gaining hands‑on experience in how a global youth‑culture brand builds long‑term relationships with its community. By joining our team, you will:

- Gain practical experience in CRM, loyalty, and lifecycle marketing , working on real campaigns that reach millions of consumers across EMEA
- Learn how to translate consumer data and insights into meaningful actions that drive engagement, retention, and brand love
- Develop a strong understanding of Vans Family , loyalty mechanics, and how community‑driven brands create value beyond transactions
- Work closely with an international, cross‑functional team , collaborating with Brand, Digital, eCommerce, and Central CRM teams
- Build confidence using industry‑leading tools and processes , with exposure to campaign execution, reporting, and performance optimization
- Benefit from a supportive learning environment, including on‑the‑job coaching, feedback, and networking opportunities across teams and brands within VF

This internship is a unique opportunity to learn by doing, grow your skill set, and contribute to shaping how Vans connects with its community — always "Off The Wall". The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including:

- Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project
- One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands
- Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership

We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy:

- Hybrid working policy
- 50% discount on VF brands
- On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives
- Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks
- Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location
- A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together.

## Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging
As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day.

## Contatto
Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0012
